personalization_hook: Arizona's AG filed a NEPA challenge to a 1,500-bed ICE facility in Surprise after the federal government paid $70M for a site directly across from a Rinchem chlorine and hydrofluoric-acid warehouse. RMP timing overlap is the central factual hook.
